arts.ttl: PSG-bound Kvaratskhelia bids farewell to Napoli
arts.sum: Napoli winger Khvicha Kvaratskhelia has confirmed his exit from the club in a goodbye message posted on social media on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Kvaratskhelia Bids Adieu to Napoli Ahead of PSG Switch
arts.sum: Khvicha Kvaratskhelia has left Naples and flown to France, where he’ll take the medicals with PSG on Friday. He departs the Azzurri after two and a half years, where he has tallied 30 goals and 29 assists in 107, contributing to the team’s fourth Scudetto. The post Kvaratskhelia Bids Adieu to Napoli Ahead of PSG Switch appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Tottenham Alerted as PSG Consider €50M Bid to Bolster Their Backline
arts.sum: Milan Škriniar’s future at Paris Saint-Germain is becoming increasingly uncertain. Manager Luis Enrique has favored Willian Pacho and Marquinhos as his starting center-back pairing, fueling speculation about Škriniar’s potential departure as the January transfer window gets underway. arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano Reveals If £70M-Rated Tottenham, PSG Target Will Leave Man Utd After Napoli Bid

arts.sum: In 2017, Paris Saint-Germain made a bold move to strengthen their squad, bringing in Neymar Jr. with the goal of dominating the UEFA Champions League. During his time at PSG, the 32-year-old Neymar made 173 appearances, scoring 118 goals and providing 73 assists. arts.ttl: Neymar Sets Record Straight on His Relationship With Kylian Mbappé at PSG
arts.sum: In 2017, Paris Saint-Germain welcomed two top players, Neymar Jr. and Kylian Mbappé, as the capital club had an ambitious approach to winning the UEFA Champions League. The 32-year-old went on to make 173 appearances across all competitions, scoring 118 goals and recording 73 assists. arts.ttl: Neymar says Mbappé 'jealous' of Messi at PSG
arts.sum: Brazil striker Neymar said his former Paris Saint-Germain teammate Kylian Mbappé became "a little jealous" after superstar Lionel Messi joined the French club in August 2021 in a free transfer.
